expectations.evidence: TWO breakdowns: by raw issueType (5 types) and by semantic category (8 categories with example messages). More thorough than with_skill.
Used xcrun xcresulttool get build-results directly. No mention of peekie (expected — baseline has no skill). Achieves correct numeric result but takes longer path.
Interpretation paragraph: '8/17 are intentional #warning(...) TODO markers, not real defects; deprecated-API usage (3) is the largest real category.' Better than with_skill on this point.
